data.title: Faraday Future presents new EAI vehicles and robotics at UMEX 2026 in Abu Dhabi, aims to revolutionize mobility in Middle East.
data.description: Faraday Future Intelligent Electric Inc. (NASDAQ: FFAI) recently presented its latest innovations at UMEX 2026 in Abu Dhabi, including the FF 91, the Company’s new First Class EAI-MPV, and the FX Super One. The event, held from January 20 to 22, provided a platform for the California-based company to showcase its EAI robotics solutions as well. This exhibition marked Faraday Future's demonstration of its forward-looking approach to EAI-driven mobility in the Middle East region. The company highlighted its vision for the future with a range of EAI vehicles and robotics solutions during the event.

data.title: Goodfin launches Goodfin Go, using AI for private market investments worth millions; correction issued on 22-Jan-2026.
data.description: Goodfin has recently introduced Goodfin Go, a new platform empowered by AI agents to oversee private market investments worth millions of dollars. This update was announced on 22-Jan-2026 by Goodfin via PR Newswire. The platform aims to revolutionize the investment experience and provide enhanced services to clients in the private market sector. For more detailed information, please refer to the amended release provided by the company.

data.title: QCY unveils MeloBuds N20, premium hybrid NC wireless earbuds in China on Jan 22, 2026 driven by audio innovation.
data.description: In Dongguan, China on January 22, 2026, QCY, a prominent brand known for its commitment to audio innovation, introduced the MeloBuds N20 Wireless Earbuds with Hybrid Noise Cancelling technology. This release comes as part of a dynamic period of advancement in the audio industry, where innovation is key. The MeloBuds N20 offers a blend of exceptional sound quality and noise cancellation. This launch signifies QCY's dedication to enhancing the audio experience for consumers.

data.title: Ambiq Micro, Inc. announces pricing of upsized public offering of 2,679,600 shares at $31.00 per share.
data.description: Ambiq Micro, Inc. revealed the pricing of an increased underwritten public offering, totaling 2,679,600 shares of common stock at $31.00 per share. Of this offering, 2,636,651 shares are from Ambiq, while 42,949 shares are being offered by select stockholders. The gross proceeds to Ambiq from this offering are expected to be significant.

data.title: Imperial Metals Corp drills at Mount Polley, finds 11m with 4.43% copper, 1.53 g/t gold, and 41.7 g/t silver; program: 9 holes, 3,718.3m.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on January 22, 2026, Imperial Metals Corporation shared details about the initial diamond drill hole results from the Mount Polley 2025 Phase 2 Diamond Drill Program. The program comprised nine holes totaling 3,718.3 meters. The first hole revealed 11.0 meters with a grade of 4.43% copper, 1.53 grams per ton of gold, and 41.7 grams per ton of silver. The company trades on the TSX under the symbol III.

data.title: Walgreens preparing for winter storms across US, monitoring closely and prioritizing safety of patients and team members.
data.description: Amidst the looming threat of severe winter storms and frigid temperatures expected to hit various parts of the country, Walgreens based in Deerfield, Illinois is actively ensuring the safety of its patients, team members, and communities. The company is closely tracking the path of the storms and advising all individuals in affected areas to adhere to local authorities' guidance for their safety. As part of their preparation efforts, Walgreens is implementing measures to safeguard all involved parties.

data.title: FPT and LG CNS partner to expand AI education solutions in Southeast Asia, targeting Vietnam market.
data.description: In Hanoi, Vietnam, a strategic partnership has been formed between the global technology and IT services provider FPT and South Korean AI transformation company LG CNS. This collaboration aims to enhance AI-powered education and training solutions in Vietnam and the wider Southeast Asia market. By combining LG CNS’s AI education solutions with FPT’s global reach, market access, and local expertise, the partnership seeks to meet the increasing need for technology-driven learning in the region. The collaboration will leverage FPT's presence and LG CNS’s expertise to cater to the growing demand for AI-based education solutions in the area.
